hero.title: Secure email signing for your organization
hero.subtitle: PostGuard for Business lets your organization sign and encrypt emails with identity-verified attributes. Manage API keys, verify your domain, and maintain full audit trails.

apiKeys.title: API Key Management
apiKeys.description: Create and manage API keys with granular control over which organizational attributes each key signs with.

dns.title: DNS Verification
dns.description: Verify your domain ownership and configure DNS records so PostGuard can sign emails on your behalf.

auditLog.title: Email Audit Log
auditLog.description: Full audit trail of every signed email. Revoke emails, track read receipts, and export compliance reports.

identity.title: Identity-Based Signing
identity.description: Sign emails with your organization name, KVK number, phone, and email — verified through Yivi.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: Emails are encrypted end-to-end. Only the intended recipient with the right identity attributes can decrypt.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Built on the open-source PostGuard protocol. Full transparency, no vendor lock-in, community-driven.

cta.title: Ready to secure your organization's email?
cta.subtitle: Register for PostGuard for Business and start signing emails in minutes.
